title: The Official Star Wars Fact File 60
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 60}} {{ReferenceMagazine |image=[[File:Fact_file_60.jpg]] |title=''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 60 |editor=[[Christopher Cerasi]] |contributors= |publisher=[[De Agostini]] |release date=[[February 19]], [[2003]]{{FFdates|60}} |intl release= |pages= |issue=60 |featured= |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' }} '''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 60''' was the sixtieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[February 19]], [[2003]]. {{Magazine-stub|issue}} ==Contents== *Prisoners on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]
How [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] were captured by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] *[[Hermione Bagwa/Legends|Hermione Bagwa]] *[[Tanith Shire]] *[[Death Star conference room/Legends|Death Star - Imperial Conference Room]] *[[Battle droid/Legends|Military Droids]]
[[War-robot|Xim the Despot's all-conquering war droid]] *[[R5-D4/Legends|R5-D4 Astromech Droid]] *[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett's]] Equipment *''[[Slave II]]'' ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from The Official Star Wars Fact File 60}} {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= |creatures= |droids= |events= |locations= |organizations= |species= |vehicles= |technology= *[[Holotable/Legends|Holotable]] **[[Imperial holotable]] |miscellanea= }} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{FactFileNav|59|61}} {{Interlang |fi=The Official Star Wars Fact File 60 |ka=The Official Star Wars Fact File 60 }} [[Category:The Official Star Wars Fact File (2002) issues|60]]
